zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Durvassal於1239年出生在英國瓦維其可爾庫頓時，他的父親Philip Durvassal26歲，母親Felicia Camville23歲。他於1258年與Margery Spermore在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1328年在英國瓦維其可爾斯白納爾享年89歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Durvassal于1239年出生在英国瓦維其可爾庫頓时，他的父亲Philip Durvassal26岁，母亲Felicia Camville23岁。他于1258年与Margery Spermore在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1328年在英国瓦維其可爾斯白納爾享年89岁。

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Durvassal was born in 1239, in Coughton, Warwickshire, England, his father, Philip Durvassal, was 26 and his mother, Felicia Camville, was 23. He married Margery Spermore in 1258, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1328, in Spernall, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 89.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Durvassal est né en 1239, à Coughton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Philip Durvassal, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Felicia Camville, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Margery Spermore en 1258, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1328, à Spernall, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 89 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Durvassal 1239 in Coughton, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Philip Durvassal 26 und seine Mutter Felicia Camville 23. Er hat 1258 in England, United Kingdom Margery Spermore geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1328 im Alter von 89 Jahren in Spernall, Warwickshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Durvassal è nato il nel 1239 nel Coughton, Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, Philip Durvassal, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Felicia Camville, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Margery Spermore nel 1258, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1328, nel Spernall, Warwickshire, England, all'età di 89 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Durvassalが1239年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコウトンで生まれた時，父Philip Durvassalは26歳，母Felicia Camvilleは23歳であった。1258年にイギリスイギリスでMargery Spermoreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1328年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアスペルナルで89歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Durvassal(이)가 1239년 영국 워윅실르 코우그h턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Philip Durvassal(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Felicia Camville(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1258년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Margery Spermore(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1328년 영국 워윅실르 스퍼널에서 89세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Durvassal nasceu em 1239, em Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Philip Durvassal, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Felicia Camville, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Spermore em 1258, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1328, em Spernall, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 89 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Durvassal родился в 1239 г. в местности коугтон, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Philip Durvassal было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Felicia Camville, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Spermore в 1258 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1328 г. в местности спирналл, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 89 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Durvassal nació en 1239, en Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Philip Durvassal, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Felicia Camville, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Margery Spermore en 1258, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1328, en Spernall, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 89 años.
